activity.name: Cap Fomentor
activity.description:
A fantastic day full of drama. Bowen's derailleur cable failed on the second climb. With Arturo Crespo 's help we locked it into 4th gear. Bowen finished the climbs in both directions and we found a bike shop that fixed both his and my bike. I paced Boen on the way back from the lighthouse. Amazing how both boys are so resilient and strong.‍
🎷🐛 15.45 new miles

-- From Wandrer
